heading: Contracts for energy or fuel for military installations
label: 2922a Contracts for energy or fuel for military installations
notes: Amendments2019—Subsec. (d). substituted “energy resilience are included as critical factors” for “resilience are prioritized and included”.Pub. L. 116–922018—Subsec. (d). amended subsec. (d) generally. Prior to amendment, subsec. (d) read as follows: “The Secretary concerned shall prioritize energy security and resilience.”Pub. L. 115–2322017—Subsec. (d). added subsec. (d).Pub. children.text: for the provision and operation of energy production facilities on real property under the Secretary’s jurisdiction or on private property and the purchase of energy produced from such facilities.

children.label: b
children.text: A contract may be made under subsection (a) only after the approval of the proposed contract by the Secretary of Defense.

children.label: c
children.text: The costs of contracts under this section for any year may be paid from annual appropriations for that year.

children.label: d
children.text: The Secretary concerned shall ensure energy security and energy resilience are included as critical factors in the provision and operation of energy production facilities under this section.
